title: taba` #2883
definition:
1) to sink, sink into, sink down, pierce, settle down, drown, be
    settled, be planted
    1a) (Qal) to sink, sink down
    1b) (Pual) to be sunk
    1c) (Hophal) to cause to sink
nasbUsage:

    settled, be planted
    1a) (Qal) to sink, sink down
    1b) (Pual) to be sunk
    1c) (Hophal) to cause to sink

    NASB:  to sink, sink down
